subcodes.first_line: The transformation of the Mashriqu'l-Adhkár to a more excellent and exalted place is permissible; the establishment of multiple Mashriqu'l-Adhkárs in a single city is acceptable [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبدیل مشرق الاذکار بمحلّی احسن و اعلی جائز تعدّد مشرق الاذکار در بلدهٴ واحده مقبول
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @House of Justice, @law of obligatory prayer, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @justice and wrath of God, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
